title: Phyllobolus roseus
taxonomy: Phyllobolus roseus is classified as a species of fungus, specifically belonging to the family Mycoblastomataceae. This species is a type of lichenicolous fungus, meaning it is a fungus that grows on lichens. Phyllobolus roseus is typically found in association with the lichen genus Ochrolichen. The classification of Phyllobolus roseus is further supported by its unique morphological characteristics and genetic features. Its classification within the kingdom Fungi is well-established in mycological literature.
